title: Merkle: Hasher
description: Implement Hasher component. Computes SHA-256 hashes for individual files (leaf nodes) and for sorted child hash lists (interior nodes). Deterministic: same content always produces same hash, order-independent via sorting. Maps to merkle REQ-1 + REQ-6, component Hasher. Ref: spec/merkle/arch_hasher.md, spec/merkle/impl_hash_computation.md
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#11. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: IDValidator
description: Implement IDValidator component. Checks ID uniqueness within each array and validates all cross-reference targets exist (implements, uses, describes, depends_on, requires_module, groups, preq_id). Maps to validator REQ-5 + REQ-6, component IDValidator. Ref: spec/validator/arch_id_validator.md, spec/validator/impl_id_validation.md

title: Merkle: TreeBuilder
description: Implement TreeBuilder component. Builds the merkle tree by walking the spec directory structure. Maps spec hierarchy to tree nodes: project → module → {arch, impl} → leaves. Maps to merkle REQ-2, component TreeBuilder. Uses Hasher. Ref: spec/merkle/arch_tree_builder.md, spec/merkle/impl_tree_construction.md
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#12. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: ErrorReporter
description: Implement ErrorReporter component. Aggregates validation errors from all checkers and formats them as structured JSON. Exit 0 if valid, exit 1 with errors. Maps to validator REQ-7, component ErrorReporter. Ref: spec/validator/arch_error_reporter.md, spec/validator/impl_error_output.md

title: Validator: ContentResolver
description: Implement ContentResolver component. Walks all content paths in module.json files and verifies referenced markdown files exist relative to module directory. Maps to validator REQ-2, component ContentResolver. Ref: spec/validator/arch_content_resolver.md, spec/validator/impl_content_resolution.md

title: Apply: SnapshotSaver
description: Implement SnapshotSaver component. Saves the new merkle snapshot after all bead actions are complete to mark the current state as baseline. Maps to apply REQ-5, component SnapshotSaver. Ref: spec/apply/arch_snapshot_saver.md, spec/apply/impl_snapshot_saving.md

title: Build spex impact subcommand
description: Diff + bead lookup. Given changed spec nodes, find all beads referencing them via metadata. Classify actions: create/close/review. Output structured impact report as JSON.

title: Build spex hash subcommand
description: Compute merkle tree over spec. Hash each leaf (md + json files), compute interior nodes (arch_hash, impl_hash, module_hash, project_hash). Output per-node hashes as JSON. Store snapshots as committed file.

title: Merkle: ImpactClassifier
description: Implement ImpactClassifier component. Classifies changes as impl-only, arch+impl, or structural based on which level of the tree changed. Maps to merkle REQ-5, component ImpactClassifier. Uses DiffEngine. Ref: spec/merkle/arch_impact_classifier.md, spec/merkle/impl_impact_classification.md

title: Build spex setup subcommand
description: Install spex-machina skills into Claude Code. Symlinks skills/spec/ and skills/propose/ into ~/.claude/skills/. Similar to bd setup claude. Makes /spec and /propose available globally.

title: Merkle: DiffEngine
description: Implement DiffEngine component. Compares two hash trees (current vs snapshot) and identifies changed nodes at every level. Maps to merkle REQ-4, component DiffEngine. Uses TreeBuilder and SnapshotStore. Ref: spec/merkle/arch_diff_engine.md, spec/merkle/impl_diff_algorithm.md

title: Validator: DAGChecker
description: Implement DAGChecker component. Builds dependency graphs from module, requirement, and component references, then checks for cycles. Maps to validator REQ-3, component DAGChecker. Depends on SchemaChecker. Ref: spec/validator/arch_dag_checker.md, spec/validator/impl_cycle_detection.md

title: Apply: BeadCloser
description: Implement BeadCloser component. Closes obsolete beads via br close with a reason derived from the impact report. Maps to apply REQ-2, component BeadCloser. Ref: spec/apply/arch_bead_closer.md, spec/apply/impl_bead_closure.md

title: Build spex register subcommand
description: Register a proposal. Copy/link to proposals/ directory, assign timestamp name. Validate proposal structure (required sections for project vs change type).

title: Build spex render subcommand
description: Generate output from spec. Markdown: collated doc with md content inlined. DOT: graphviz graph. JSON: full graph for piping.

title: Rewire /implement, /review, /fix for beads
description: Update implement to use bd ready --json and bd update --claim. Update review and fix to read bead metadata for spec context. Use external_ref for PR linking. These skills move from dot repo into spex-machina.

title: Write /spec skill
description:
Create skills/spec/SKILL.md. Reads proposal from spec/proposals/, creates/modifies spec JSON + md files following the schema. Detects new project (no project.json) vs new module vs alter mode. Calls spex validate after edits once available. This is the LLM interface for spec authoring.

Interface mapping: The schema has no explicit interface node type. When migrating legacy specs that have an Interfaces section (e.g. Python DSL, C ABI, Serialization, Data Loaders, Visualization, Export), model behavioral contracts (C ABI, Serialization) as functional requirements and structural interfaces (Data Loaders, Visualization, Export) as components.

title: Define spec JSON schema (project.json + module.json)
description: Write JSON Schema documents for project.json and module.json. Node types: requirement, component, impl_section, data_flow, milestone, module. Edge types: implements, uses, described_in, depends_on, groups, requires_module. All IDs numeric within type. Content paths to markdown. This schema is the foundation everything else validates against.

title: Write /propose skill
description: Create skills/propose/SKILL.md. Free-form conversation -> structured proposal.md. Detects type: project proposal (no project.json) vs change proposal. Writes to spec/proposals/YYYY-MM-DD-name.md. Calls spex register once available.

title: Apply: ProposalTagger
description: Implement ProposalTagger component. Tags all affected beads (created, closed, reviewed) with the proposal reference that triggered the change. Maps to apply REQ-4, component ProposalTagger. Uses BeadCreator, BeadCloser, BeadUpdater. Ref: spec/apply/arch_proposal_tagger.md, spec/apply/impl_proposal_tagging.md

title: Merkle: SnapshotStore
description: Implement SnapshotStore component. Reads and writes snapshot files. Serializes the hash tree to a JSON file for git storage. Maps to merkle REQ-3, component SnapshotStore. Ref: spec/merkle/arch_snapshot_store.md, spec/merkle/impl_snapshot_format.md
close_reason: Reviewed and approved in PR#13. All review feedback addressed.

title: Build spex log subcommand
description: Show proposal history: which proposals led to which spec changes, linked to which bead actions. Full audit trail.

title: Apply: BeadUpdater
description: Implement BeadUpdater component. Updates bead metadata to reflect modified spec nodes (spec_hash, etc). Maps to apply REQ-3, component BeadUpdater. Ref: spec/apply/arch_bead_updater.md, spec/apply/impl_metadata_update.md

title: Build spex diff subcommand
description: Compare current merkle tree against stored snapshot. Report changed leaves, changed paths. Classify impact: impl-only / arch+impl / structural.

title: Build spex apply subcommand
description: Execute impact report via bd CLI: create beads with spec metadata, close obsolete beads, update modified bead metadata. Tag with proposal reference. Save new merkle snapshot.

title: Build spex validate subcommand
description: First Go code. Reads spec directory, checks: JSON schema conformance, all content paths exist, DAG acyclic, no orphan requirements/components, IDs unique within type. Exit 0 if valid, exit 1 with structured JSON errors. After this, spex-machina can validate its own spec.

title: Create spex-machina spec from proposal (bootstrap)
description: Run /spec on proposals/2026-02-23-spex-machina.md to create full spec: project.json, module JSONs for schema/validator/merkle/impact/apply/proposal/render, arch and impl markdown files. First real use of the format. Bootstrap: done manually since spex validate doesn't exist yet.
close_reason: Spec bootstrap complete: project.json, 7 module JSONs, 63 markdown content files. All cross-references valid, all traceability gaps fixed per PR #7 review.

title: Validator: SchemaChecker
description: Implement SchemaChecker component. Validates project.json and module.json against embedded JSON Schemas. Reports all violations, not just the first. Maps to validator REQ-1, component SchemaChecker. Ref: spec/validator/arch_schema_checker.md, spec/validator/impl_schema_validation.md
close_reason: SchemaChecker implemented and reviewed in PR#9. All review feedback addressed.

title: Validator: OrphanDetector
description: Implement OrphanDetector component. Finds requirements not implemented by any component and components not described by any impl_section. Maps to validator REQ-4, component OrphanDetector. Ref: spec/validator/arch_orphan_detector.md, spec/validator/impl_orphan_detection.md

title: Apply: BeadCreator
description: Implement BeadCreator component. Creates new beads via br create with spec metadata: module, component, impl_section, spec_hash, proposal reference. Maps to apply REQ-1, component BeadCreator. Ref: spec/apply/arch_bead_creator.md, spec/apply/impl_bead_creation.md
